title: Thai Chicken Citrus Crumble
description: A twist on traditional chicken dishes, this recipe combines the flavors of Thailand with a crunchy citrus crumble topping.
instructions: Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper
Heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken breasts and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes per side. Transfer to a baking dish.
Mix together lime zest, lime juice, and Thai red curry paste. Pour over chicken breasts.
In a separate bowl, mix together rice flour, brown sugar, and crumble.
Dot the top of each chicken breast with unsalted butter.
Sprinkle the crumble mixture evenly over the top of each chicken breast.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through and crumble is golden brown.
